title: BEM-845 execute 844 next
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/protocols','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 21:36 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
prev=load('governance/state/bem844_read_843_and_process_if_ready.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
created_files=[]
if ps=='triad_ready_for_protocol':
    proto=Path('governance/protocols/BEM845_AGREED_MULTI_AGENT_PROTOCOL_DRAFT.md')
    responses=prev.get('real_responses',[])
    proto.write_text('# BEM-845 | Agreed Multi-Agent Protocol Draft'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Status: draft_from_verified_triad'+sep+sep+'Evidence: workflow_dispatch_results present; Claude runtime-state present; real Claude response present.'+sep+sep+'Real Claude response source: '+json.dumps(responses[-1] if responses else {},ensure_ascii=False)+sep+sep+'Next: human-readable protocol table and final agreement review.'+sep)
    created_files.append(str(proto))
    status='protocol_draft_created_from_triad'
    next_action='render human-readable protocol table and verify against operator requirements'
elif 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem845_result_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v11','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-845 repair missing workflow_dispatch_results','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='result_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify workflow_dispatch_results'
elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem845_runtime_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v11','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-845 repair missing Claude runtime state','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='runtime_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify Claude runtime state'
else:
    mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem845_real_response_required.md')
    mail.write_text('# BEM-845 | REAL RESPONSE STILL REQUIRED'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: provide real response with Decision and write to claude_to_gpt. No issue comments.'+sep)
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem845_response_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v11','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-845 repair missing real Claude response','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.extend([str(mail),str(q)])
    status='response_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify real Claude response'
state={'bem':'BEM-845','status':status,'input_status':ps,'input_missing':missing,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem845_execute_bem844_next.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem845_execute_bem844_next.md').write_text('# BEM-845 | Execute BEM-844 Next | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem845_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-845'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem845_execute_bem844_next.json','governance/reports/bem845_execute_bem844_next.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem845_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-844 next action by creating protocol draft if triad is ready, otherwise queueing exact missing proof repair')
"""
No issue comments.
